india_trends.title: Coal India sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026, final dividend for FY26
india_trends.summary: Coal India's board will meet on April 27, 2026, to approve Q4 FY26 financial results and discuss the final dividend. Analysts predict a weak performance due to competition and demand issues, with expected declines in production, revenue, and EBITDA.

india_trends.title: Markets on edge amid US-Iran conflict: How to make your portfolio war-proof?
india_trends.summary: As geopolitical uncertainties rise, experts suggest a balanced investment strategy focused on diversification, quality equities, and strategic gold allocation to protect portfolios.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Citius TransNet Investment Trust's ₹1,105-cr IPO to open on Apr 17
india_trends.summary: Citius TransNet Investment Trust (Trust) is a transport sector-focused infrastructure investment trust (InvIT), established to acquire, manage and invest in a portfolio of transport infrastructure assets, including roads, in the country

india_trends.title: Jyoti CNC shares slump 16% after France probe into subsidiary
india_trends.summary: The decline follows a stock exchange disclosure by the company stating that French authorities have initiated a probe into Huron Graffenstaden SAS and certain employees

india_trends.title: 1200% rally in five years! Multibagger stock jumps 7% despite weak trends on Dalal Street
india_trends.summary: Gyftr share price rallied as much 7% on Monday despite weak market sentiments. Here's Gyftr's recent business update and share price trend.

india_trends.title: You can now invest in fixed deposits on Zerodha's Coin: Rates, banks and how it works
india_trends.summary: Zerodha has launched fixed deposit (FD) investments on its Coin platform, marking another step in its push to broaden beyond equities and mutual funds into more traditional savings products.

india_trends.title: Realty firms have cushions amid this economic shock. Can those salvage stocks?
india_trends.summary: Record FY26 pre-sales lift listed developers, but war-led uncertainty, cost inflation and affordability concerns cloud FY27 guidance and margin outlook.

india_trends.title: Puravankara shares jump 17% in biggest one-day gain in two years after March quarter business update
india_trends.summary: Puravankara's shares surged 17.3% on April 13 following March quarter update, reporting a 190% increase in sales to ₹3,547 crore. The company also saw a 36% rise in collections, and launched new projects, enhancing its sales pipeline for FY27.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European shares slip as Middle East talks collapse, naval blockade looms
india_trends.summary: European shares dropped on ​Monday as expectations of ​a swift resolution to the Middle East conflict ​faded following the breakdown of U.S.-Iran negotiations and Washington's decision to impose a blockade around the Strait of Hormuz.

india_trends.summary: Market expert Sunil Subramaniam warns the bottom is yet to be established amid geopolitical tensions and Trump-induced volatility. india_trends.title: Citius TransNet Investment Trust InvIT IPO price band set at ₹99-100 per unit; check key dates, issue details
india_trends.summary: Citius TransNet Investment Trust InvIT IPO is priced between ₹99 and ₹100, with subscription from April 17 to April 21. It allocates 75% to QIBs and 25% to NIIs, aiming to raise ₹1,105 crore for acquisitions and corporate purposes.

india_trends.title: ITC, paints, QSR: Abneesh Roy on what you should buy and avoid right now
india_trends.summary: Consumer sector outlook for FY27 faces challenges from cigarette tax hikes and crude oil shocks. Abneesh Roy of Nuvama Institutional Equities highlights opportunities in Nestle, Marico, Tata Consumer, Titan, Avenue Supermart, and VMart. Quick service restaurants are advised to approach with caution

india_trends.title: Is Anand Rathi’s FY26 growth solely market-driven?
india_trends.summary: For Anand Rathi Wealth, sustained execution is already priced in. The key monitorable is whether operating leverage continues to offset market cyclicality.

india_trends.title: Stock market holiday: Are BSE and NSE closed tomorrow on account of Ambedkar Jayanti?
india_trends.summary: Stock market indices - Sensex and Nifty 50 - fell over 2% on Monday ahead of a stock market holiday tomorrow. Here's the full schedule of stock market holidays in 2026.

india_trends.title: FIIs raise stakes in 8 smallcaps in Q4; stocks surge up to 70% in CY26
india_trends.summary: FIIs boost stakes in select small-caps despite weak markets, backing winners. Twelve stocks deliver 14–69% gains in Q4 FY26, signaling targeted confidence and momentum-driven accumulation across sectors.
